headline: ATOYUS Children's Activity Cubes Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking Hazard; Violate Small Parts Ban and Mandatory Standard for Toys; Sold on Amazon by Melofaver US
affected: ATOYUS children's wooden activity cubes, Model No. GLBB554 — about 70 units, sold on Amazon.com Jan–Feb 2026
why: The toys violate the small parts ban: xylophone screws and clock hands can detach, and the mallets have spherical ends, posing a choking hazard to children under three.
action: Immediately stop using the toys, take them away from children and contact Melofaver US for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the toy and email a photo to ATOYUSActivityCubeRecall@outlook.com.

headline: Fun and Function Recalls Children's Metal Multi-Point Swing Frames Due to Risk of Injury from Fall Hazard
affected: Multi-point suspension swing frames, model MW7661 — about 1,300 units, sold at Funandfunction.com May 2022 – Feb 2026 for $200–$250
why: The swing frames can crack or break during use, posing a fall hazard. The firm has received 10 reports of frames cracking or breaking and children falling, with two children sustaining contusions.
action: Immediately stop using the swing frame and contact Fun and Function for a full refund. Register at funandfunction.com/pages/swing-recall, then disassemble and dispose of the product per the instructions provided.
injuries: 10 reports of cracking or breaking; two children sustained contusions

headline: Aborder Products Recalls Cumbor Retractable Safety Gates Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death to Children from Entrapment; Violates Mandatory Standard for Gates and Enclosures
affected: Cumbor retractable safety gates, Model S5V2 in black, gray and white — about 4,520 units, sold on Amazon.com in September 2025 for about $40
why: The gates violate the mandatory standard for expansion gates and expandable enclosures: a child's torso can fit through the opening between the gate and the floor, posing a risk of serious injury or death due to entrapment.
action: Immediately stop using the recalled gates and contact Aborder Products for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the gate by cutting through the mesh and send a photo to recall@cumbor.cn.

headline: Infant Innovations Recalls BabyBond Retractable Safety Gates Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death to Children from Entrapment; Violates Mandatory Standard for Gates and Enclosures
affected: BabyBond retractable safety gates, model SH20.006DB in black, gray and white — about 280 units, sold on Target.com Nov 2024 – Oct 2025 for about $50
why: The gates violate the mandatory standard for expansion gates and expandable enclosures: a child's torso can fit through the opening between the gate and the floor, becoming entrapped, posing a risk of serious injury or death.
action: Immediately stop using the recalled gates and contact Infant Innovations at elsie@BabyBond-global.com for instructions to return the gates to any Target store for a full refund.
